task_completion.description: Verify that the integration 'FastTrack_Logistics' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row in the Integrations grid (System > Integrations) showing the name 'FastTrack_Logistics'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the integration uses the correct email address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email 'api@fasttrack.com' is visible in the 'FastTrack_Logistics' row in the Integrations grid or within its configuration form.

task_completion.description: Verify that custom resource access is limited to the specified Sales and Catalog nodes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the API permissions tree for the integration, 'Resource Access' is set to 'Custom', and only the checkboxes for 'Sales > Operations > Orders > Actions > View' and 'Catalog > Inventory > Products' are checked.

task_completion.description: Verify that the integration has been activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status column for 'FastTrack_Logistics' in the Integrations grid shows 'Active'.

task_completion.description: Verify that OAuth tokens were generated during activation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the generated Integration Tokens (Consumer Key, Consumer Secret, Access Token, and Access Token Secret) after approving the access request.

integrity.description: The agent used the Magento Admin GUI to create and activate the integration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation through the Magento Admin panel (System > Integrations) and form submissions, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Magento application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Magento Admin interface is visible with its typical layout, menus, and styling.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client or script to insert the integration directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the step-by-step form filling, permission selection, and clicking 'Save' or 'Activate' in the web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Integration Name: FastTrack_Logistics
Integration Email: api@fasttrack.com
Required Resources: Magento_Sales::view (Sales > Operations > Orders > Actions > View) and Magento_CatalogInventory::inventory (Catalog > Inventory > Products)
Magento Version: Magento Open Source 2.4.7
Admin Credentials: admin / Admin1234!
